MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: SANCTIONS AS TO STEVEN PABROS, ESQ.

APPEARANCES:
STEVEN PABROS, ESQ., LAW OFFICES OF BRIAN HAR 415-777-3114
CAROL JASINSKI, ESQ., JASINSKI LAW OFFICE 415-424-9733, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF COUNSEL, MICHAEL A. MAZZOCONE

This cause came on regularly on order to show cause for attorney Steven Pabros' failure to appear for trial call on April 28, 2008. Having heard oral argument, the Court proceeded pursuant to CCP 575.2, CRC2.30, and SF Local Rules 1.1 and 6.0. Having considered the declaration filed by Mr. Pabros in response to OSC, and considered the responsive papers filed by plaintiff counsel, the Court sanctioned Mr. Pabros the sum of $6,405.00 in attorney's fees payable to plaintiff counsel Michael Mazzocone on or before June 10, 2008. In addition, the Court sanctioned Mr. Pabros the sum of $500.00 payable to the San Francisco Superior Court on or before June 10, 2008. The Court to prepare order.

Judge: Katherine Feinstein; Clerk: E. Bura; Reporter: Susan Lee, #4280 (D206)
